action.reasoning: Observation: Full replay with last checkpoint achieved 0.7147 avg accuracy, up from 0.4655, but still below SOTA (~0.8+). Best checkpoint selection was flawed (saved early model), but using last.pt fixed that. Analysis: 10 epochs/task is insufficient; longer training with better scheduling and label smoothing can push accuracy higher. Decision: Rewrite train.py to fix best.pt (always save final model), add cosine annealing per task, label smoothing, increase epochs to 30, and evaluate on val after each task. Run training (expected ~30-40 min) then submit final checkpoint.
